name: command
description: Encapsulates a request as an object, letting you parameterize clients with different requests, queue or log requests, and support undoable operations.
when_to_use: Queue operations, schedule execution, or execute remotely
Structure a system around high-level operations built on primitive operations

structure.command: Declares an interface for executing an operation
structure.concrete_command: Defines a binding between a Receiver and an action
structure.client: Creates a ConcreteCommand and sets its receiver
structure.invoker: Asks the command to carry out the request
structure.receiver: Knows how to perform the operations associated with a request

advantages: Single Responsibility: Decouple invoker from receiver
Open/Closed: Introduce new commands without breaking existing code
Assemble simple commands into complex ones
disadvantages: Code may become more complicated with additional layer
